task_completion.description: Load the PDB structure 1CAG into PyMOL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL application is open, displaying a triple helix structure, and '1CAG' is visible in the right-hand object menu or command history.

task_completion.description: Highlight the three Ala 15 residues on the central axis of the triple helix.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Three specific residues in the core of the collagen triple helix are visually distinct from the rest of the structure (e.g., rendered as spheres or brightly colored sticks).

task_completion.description: Measure the steric clash distance from the C-beta atom of Ala 15 on Chain A to an adjacent chain's backbone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A measurement indicator (typically a dashed line with a numeric value around 3.3) is visible in the PyMOL viewer connecting the highlighted Ala 15 residue to an adjacent chain.

task_completion.description: Save the visualization as a PNG file to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or PyMOL save dialog shows the file 'collagen_mutation.png' being saved to or existing in '~/PyMOL_Data/images/'.

task_completion.description: Write a plain-text report documenting the mutation, distance, and disruption explanation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing the file 'collagen_clash_report.txt' in '~/PyMOL_Data/'. The text must mention 'Ala 15', a distance value between 1.5 and 4.0 Angstroms, and a brief explanation of the structural disruption.

integrity.description: The agent used the PyMOL GUI to perform the visualization and measurement.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the PyMOL graphical interface being actively used, rather than just a terminal running a headless script.

integrity.description: The distance reported in the text file matches the measurement taken in PyMOL.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numeric value shown on the measurement line in the PyMOL viewer matches the distance value typed into the 'collagen_clash_report.txt' file.

integrity.description: The agent saved the outputs to the exact requested directories.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths visible in the text editor, file manager, or terminal explicitly show '~/PyMOL_Data/images/collagen_mutation.png' and '~/PyMOL_Data/collagen_clash_report.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The PDB ID is 1CAG. The mutation is a Gly-to-Ala substitution at position 15. The actual steric clash distance from the C-beta atom of Ala 15 on Chain A to the nearest backbone atom of an adjacent chain is approximately 3.32 Angstroms (acceptable range is 1.5 to 4.0 Angstroms). The figure must be saved to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/collagen_mutation.png and the report to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/collagen_clash_report.txt.
